name: Applesauce Cupcakes
recipeIngredient: (Or 1/4 teaspoon each nutmeg, cloves, ginger, allspice)
recipeInstructions:
1. Stir together the cake flour, baking soda, and spices in a bowl. Set aside.
2. In another bowl, combine the diet margarine, egg, applesauce, and vanilla extract. Beat until well blended.
3. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the wet mixture. Mix until just combined.
4. Stir in the raisins.
5. Divide the batter evenly among 16 nonstick muffin or cupcake cups.
6. Bake at 400°F (200°C) for 20 minutes or more, until golden brown.
{105 calories per cupcake}
